name: Add a Rectangle class
description: The shapes module has a Circle class. Add a Rectangle class extending Shape, with width and height, area = width * height, and export it. The existing tests already expect this class. Make them pass.
prompt: src/shapes.js exports Shape and Circle. The tests in src/shapes.test.js already import `Rectangle` and expect it to have width and height with area = width*height and name 'rectangle'. Add the Rectangle class to src/shapes.js and export it. Run `npm test` to confirm all tests pass. Do not modify the tests.
